notes:
What's new in V3.1.7:
• Kling 4K — Kling V3 and O3 now generate native 4K video. Select 4K in the resolution pill for Kling 3.0 T2V, Kling 3.0 I2V, Kling O3 T2V, Kling O3 I2V, and Kling O3 Reference.
• Large image upload fix — high-resolution images no longer fail with a file size error when generating with Kling.
• MOV attachments fully supported — attach ProRes, H.264, and other MOV footage directly.
